title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Asia-Pacific — Q2 2026
summary: Australia's simultaneous Travel Rule enforcement and stablecoin PSP licensing prep, South Korea's Q4 custody framework deadline for banks, and Indonesia's Q3 OJK custody standards create a 90-day institutional compliance window spanning 200+ banks, exchanges, and PSPs from Sydney to Seoul. Combined with Philippines BSP active enforcement, Thailand's licensing expansion, and India's securities classification framework, APAC institutional compliance upgrades represent $180M+ addressable market thr
